title: Analyze Report
description: Structured output schema for the analyze-bead subagent. Reports the result of analyzing an epic's hierarchy and enriching leaf beads with implementation context.

beadId.title: Bead ID
beadId.description: The epic bead that was analyzed.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Whether the analysis targeted a hierarchy (epic with children) or a single leaf bead.

leavesEnriched.title: Leaves Enriched
leavesEnriched.description: Array of bead IDs that received Implementation Context in their notes.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Dependency graph and execution waves summary.

waves.title: Waves
waves.description: Execution waves: each inner array is a set of bead IDs that can run in parallel. Present only in hierarchy mode.
